reviews.review_description: Can someone help me for aliscence?

I was really excited to try this game for my hemiplegic arm and hand therapy but was never able to get to the permissions screen to enter the permission code. I hope they fix this because I would really like to try out the app.

developer_response.body:
Hi there!

Do you have an active holomoves subscription? If not, that could be the problem. Please let me know. you can email me at: yamir@holomoves.nl
